title: Oscars 2026 Best Adapted Screenplay Winner
text: Paul Thomas Anderson won the Oscar for Best Adapted Screenplay for his film One Battle After Another at the 2026 Academy Awards. This was his first Oscar win in this category. In his acceptance speech, Anderson explained his motivation, stating: I wrote this movie for my kids, to say sorry for the housekeeping mess that we left in this world we're handing off to them. He also expressed optimism about the next generation, noting they will hopefully bring us some common sense and decency. He gave a special acknowledgment to his longtime partner, actress Maya Rudolph. The other nominees in the category included Will Tracy for Bugonia, Guillermo del Toro for Frankenstein, Chloé Zhao and Maggie O'Farrell for Hamnet, and Clint Bentley and Greg Kwedar for Train Dreams.
